children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read raw data from source, parse records, store in raw_data, and log ingestion
children.behavior: Based on source type, read from CSV/JSON/API, parse into records, write to raw_data, and append log entry to pipeline_log

global_vars.description: Write parsed raw records to raw_data store
Append ingestion log entry to pipeline_log

constraints.description: Must handle malformed source records without crashing
Must log errors for each failed record parse

acceptance_criteria.description: All valid records from source are written to raw_data
Pipeline_log contains ingestion entry with record count and errors

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw_data, skip malformed records, store in processed_data, and log transformation
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply each rule to each record, skip records that cause errors, write valid transformed records to processed_data, append log entry
children.signature: def TransformData(transform_config: dict, raw_data: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read raw records from raw_data store for transformation
Write transformed records to processed_data store
Append transformation log entry to pipeline_log

constraints.description: Must skip records that fail transformation and log errors

acceptance_criteria.description: All valid transformed records are written to processed_data
Malformed records are skipped and errors logged in pipeline_log

children.name: ValidateData
children.purpose: Check processed_data against quality rules, mark invalid records, compute quality_score, and log validation
children.behavior: Read processed_data, apply quality rules to each record, assign quality_score, mark invalid records (e.g., set a 'valid' flag), append log entry

global_vars.description: Read processed_data for validation, update records with quality_score and valid flag
Append validation log entry to pipeline_log

data_operations.description: Read and update records with validation metadata

constraints.description: Must assign quality_score to every record
Must not remove any records from processed_data

acceptance_criteria.description: All records in processed_data have quality_score and valid flag
Pipeline_log contains validation entry with record count and errors

children.name: ExportData
children.purpose: Format validated records as output in requested format, log export, and return final result
children.behavior: Read processed_data, filter to only records that passed validation, format as CSV or JSON, append log entry, return pipeline_result with data
children.signature: def ExportData(export_format: str, processed_data: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read processed_data to filter and format valid records
Append export log entry to pipeline_log

constraints.description: Must only export records with valid flag set to true
Must format output according to export_format parameter

acceptance_criteria.description: Only valid records are included in exported data
Pipeline_log contains export entry with record count and format

governance_notes: Parent global state conservation verified: raw_data (read_write) covered by IngestData(write) + TransformData(read); processed_data (read_write) covered by TransformData(write) + ValidateData(read_write) + ExportData(read); pipeline_log (read_write) covered by all four children (each writes). All parent operations are fully distributed without omission.
